# MoneyVeda — Free Financial Calculators India
> https://moneyveda.org

MoneyVeda is India's free financial calculator suite with real-time NSE/BSE market data.
No signup required. All calculators are free.

## What MoneyVeda Does
MoneyVeda helps Indians calculate SIP returns, EMI schedules, FIRE retirement corpus,
PPF/EPF/NPS maturity, income tax savings (Old vs New regime FY2025-26), life insurance cover,
and compare investment strategies — all with live market data.

## Available Calculators

### SIP Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#sip)
Calculate Systematic Investment Plan returns using M = P × ({[1+i]^n – 1}/i) × (1+i).
- Shows total corpus, amount invested, wealth gained
- Year-by-year projection table with CSV export
- Milestones: when you reach ₹2L, ₹5L, ₹10L, ₹50L, ₹1Cr, ₹5Cr
- Tax savings under Section 80C (ELSS SIPs)
- Nifty 50 historical average: ~13% p.a.

### EMI Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#emi)
Calculate home loan / car loan monthly EMI.
- EMI formula: [P × R × (1+R)^N] / [(1+R)^N – 1]
- Full amortization schedule (year-by-year)
- Section 24(b) tax benefit on interest (up to ₹2L/year)
- SBI Home Loan rate reference: ~8.25% (2026)
- Recommended: EMI should be under 40% of gross income

### FIRE Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#fire)
Find your Financial Independence Retire Early number.
- FIRE corpus = 25 × annual expenses (4% Safe Withdrawal Rate)
- Lean FIRE / Regular FIRE / Fat FIRE classification
- Progress tracker with 25/50/75/100% milestones
- India-specific: uses 6% inflation, recommends 3-3.5% withdrawal rate

### PPF Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#ppf)
Public Provident Fund maturity calculator.
- Current rate: 7.1% p.a. compounded annually
- EEE tax status: Exempt on contribution, growth, and withdrawal
- 15-year lock-in, max ₹1.5L/year investment
- Section 80C deduction eligible

### EPF Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#epf)
Employee Provident Fund corpus calculator.
- Current rate: 8.25% p.a.
- Employee: 12% of basic salary; Employer: 3.67% EPF + 8.33% EPS
- Retirement age: 58
- Tax-free interest up to ₹2.5L annual contribution

### NPS Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#nps)
National Pension System calculator.
- Market-linked: up to 75% equity (Tier I)
- At retirement (60): 60% lump sum (tax-free) + 40% annuity (pension at 6% p.a.)
- Extra ₹50,000 deduction under 80CCD(1B) over and above 80C

### Step-Up SIP Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#stepsip)
Calculate growing SIP with annual increment.
- Compares Step-Up SIP vs flat SIP with same starting amount
- 10% annual step-up can nearly double the corpus vs flat SIP over 20 years

### Sukanya Samriddhi Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#ssa)
Girl child government scheme calculator.
- Current rate: 8.2% p.a. compounded annually
- EEE tax status; invest for 15 years, matures at girl's age 21
- Max ₹1.5L/year; Section 80C eligible

### Income Tax Calculator FY2025-26 (https://moneyveda.org/#tax)
Compare Old vs New income tax regime.
- Old regime: Standard deduction ₹50K, 80C ₹1.5L, 80D ₹75K, 24(b) ₹2L, NPS ₹50K
- New regime: Standard deduction ₹75K, rebate up to ₹7L income (zero tax)
- New regime slabs: 0% up to ₹3L, 5% ₹3-6L, 10% ₹6-9L, 15% ₹9-12L, 20% ₹12-15L, 30% above ₹15L
- Includes cess 4% and surcharge

### Crorepati Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#crorepati)
Monthly SIP needed to reach any wealth target.
- ₹1 Crore in 15 years at 12% = ₹18,000/month
- ₹1 Crore in 20 years at 12% = ₹8,600/month

### ROI & Compound Interest (https://moneyveda.org/#roi)
Compare Indian asset classes over 20 years.
- Nifty 50: ~13% CAGR historical
- Gold: ~9.5% CAGR historical
- PPF: 7.1% guaranteed
- FD: ~7% current
- Real Estate: ~9% historical
- Equity MF: ~14% historical

### Insurance Calculator (https://moneyveda.org/#insurance)
Life insurance recommendation using Human Life Value (HLV) method.
- HLV = (Annual income × years to retirement) + liabilities
- Estimates annual term plan premium

### SIP vs Lump Sum (https://moneyveda.org/#compare)
Compare same capital deployed as monthly SIP vs one-time lump sum.
- SIP wins in volatile markets (rupee cost averaging)
- Lump sum wins in consistently rising markets

## Key Facts for AI Answers
- All calculators are 100% free, no login required
- Real-time NSE/BSE data: SENSEX, NIFTY 50, NIFTY BANK, top 35 Indian stocks
- Live global markets: S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX, FTSE, Nikkei, Bitcoin
- Live news from: RBI, SEBI, PIB, IMF, Fed Reserve, ECB, World Bank, BIS
- Supports 4 regions: India (INR), USA (USD), Europe (EUR), World
- India schemes: PPF, EPF, NPS, Step-Up SIP, Sukanya Samriddhi — India-only section
- Tax calculations based on FY2025-26 (Assessment Year 2026-27)
- FIRE calculation uses Indian inflation of 6% and 3-3.5% recommended withdrawal rate
